mapper.select:
/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.mspUsrMgmtList =========*/
SELECT a.ORGN_ID AS orgn_id , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = a.ORGN_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS orgn_nm , a.USR_ID AS usr_id , a.USR_NM AS usr_nm , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = a.ATTC_SCTN_CD) AS attc_sctn ,TO_CHAR(a.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS reg_date ,TO_CHAR(a.LAST_LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS lst_date ,TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS rvs_date , NVL(DEL_YN , 'N') AS del_yn , NVL(USG_YN , 'N') AS usg_yn FROM ( SELECT -- count(*) CUM.ORGN_ID , CUM.USR_ID , CUM.USR_NM , CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD , CUM.REGST_DTTM , CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT , CUM.RVISN_DTTM , DEL_YN , USG_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE 1=1 AND USG_YN IN ('Y', 'S') AND REGST_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') UNION ALL SELECT CUM.ORGN_ID , CUM.USR_ID , CUM.USR_NM , CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD , CUM.REGST_DTTM , CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT , CUM.RVISN_DTTM , DEL_YN , USG_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE 1=1 AND USG_YN IN ('N') AND REGST_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') ) A ORDER BY A.REGST_DTTM, A.ORGN_ID

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.mspUsrMgmtListExcel =========*/ SELECT a.ORGN_ID AS orgnId , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = a.ORGN_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS orgnNm , a.USR_ID AS usrId , a.USR_NM AS usrNm , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = a.ATTC_SCTN_CD) AS attcSctnNm ,TO_CHAR(a.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS regstDttm , TO_CHAR(a.LAST_LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS lastLoginDt , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS rvisnDttm , NVL(DEL_YN , 'N') AS delYn , NVL(USG_YN , 'N') AS usgYn FROM ( SELECT -- count(*) CUM.ORGN_ID , CUM.USR_ID , CUM.USR_NM , CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD , CUM.REGST_DTTM , CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT , CUM.RVISN_DTTM , DEL_YN , USG_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE 1=1 AND USG_YN IN ('Y', 'S') AND REGST_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') UNION ALL SELECT CUM.ORGN_ID , CUM.USR_ID , CUM.USR_NM , CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD , CUM.REGST_DTTM , CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT , CUM.RVISN_DTTM , DEL_YN , USG_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE 1=1 AND USG_YN IN ('N') AND REGST_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') ) A ORDER BY A.REGST_DTTM, A.ORGN_ID

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.mspUsrMaskList =========*/
SELECT USR_ID, USR_NM, FN_GET_ORGNM(ORGN_ID) AS orgn_nm FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE MSK_AUTH_YN IN ('Y' , '1') AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND USR_ID LIKE '%' || #{usrId} || '%' AND USR_NM LIKE '%' || #{usrNm} || '%' ORDER BY USR_NM , ORGN_ID

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.mspUsrMaskListExcel =========*/ SELECT USR_ID as usrId, USR_NM as usrNm, FN_GET_ORGNM(ORGN_ID) AS orgnNm FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE MSK_AUTH_YN IN ('Y' , '1') AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND USR_ID LIKE '%' || #{usrId} || '%' AND USR_NM LIKE '%' || #{usrNm} || '%' ORDER BY USR_NM , ORGN_ID

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.mspUsrDelList =========*/
SELECT CUM.ORGN_ID as orgn_id , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = CUM.ORGN_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS orgn_nm , CUM.USR_ID AS usr_id , CUM.USR_NM AS usr_nm , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD) AS attc_sctn ,TO_CHAR(CUM.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS rvs_date , TO_CHAR(CUM.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS reg_date , TO_CHAR(CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS lst_date , CASE WHEN CUM.USG_YN = 'S' THEN '정지' WHEN CUM.USG_YN = 'N' THEN '삭제' ELSE CUM.USG_YN END as status FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE USG_YN NOT IN ('Y', 'S') AND CUM.RVISN_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') and CUM.PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT < #{searchEndDt}

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.mspUsrDelListExcel =========*/ SELECT CUM.ORGN_ID as orgnId , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = CUM.ORGN_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS orgnNm , CUM.USR_ID AS usrId , CUM.USR_NM AS usrNm , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD) AS attcSctnNm ,TO_CHAR(CUM.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS rvisnDttm , TO_CHAR(CUM.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS regstDttm , TO_CHAR(CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS lastLoginDt , CASE WHEN CUM.USG_YN = 'S' THEN '정지' WHEN CUM.USG_YN = 'N' THEN '삭제' ELSE CUM.USG_YN END as status FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE USG_YN NOT IN ('Y', 'S') AND CUM.RVISN_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') and CUM.PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT < #{searchEndDt}

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.mspUsrDelList =========*/
SELECT org_id ,orgn_nm , usr_id , usr_nm , attc_sctn , reg_date , lst_date ,ATTC_SCTN_CD ,ORGN_ID ,REGST_DTTM FROM ( SELECT CUM.ORGN_ID as org_id , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = CUM.ORGN_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS orgn_nm , CUM.USR_ID AS usr_id , CUM.USR_NM AS usr_nm , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD) AS attc_sctn , TO_CHAR(CUM.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS reg_date , TO_CHAR(CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS lst_date , DEL_YN as del_yn , USG_YN as usg_yn ,ATTC_SCTN_CD ,ORGN_ID ,REGST_DTTM FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE 1=1 AND CUM.USG_YN in ('Y', 'S') AND CUM.REGST_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE('20000101', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') UNION all SELECT CUM.ORGN_ID as org_id , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = CUM.ORGN_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS orgn_nm , CUM.USR_ID AS usr_id , CUM.USR_NM AS usr_nm , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD) AS attc_sctn , TO_CHAR(CUM.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS reg_date , TO_CHAR(CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS lst_date , DEL_YN as del_yn , USG_YN as usg_yn ,ATTC_SCTN_CD ,ORGN_ID ,REGST_DTTM FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE 1=1 AND CUM.USG_YN NOT IN ('Y', 'S') AND CUM.RVISN_DTTM < TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND CUM.REGST_DTTM > TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') ) a ORDER BY a.ATTC_SCTN_CD, a.ORGN_ID, a.REGST_DTTM

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.mspUsrDelListExcel =========*/ SELECT orgnId ,orgnNm , usrId , usrNm , attcSctnNm , regstDttm , lastLoginDt ,ATTC_SCTN_CD ,ORGN_ID ,REGST_DTTM FROM ( SELECT CUM.ORGN_ID as orgnId , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = CUM.ORGN_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS orgnNm , CUM.USR_ID AS usrId , CUM.USR_NM AS usrNm , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD) AS attcSctnNm , TO_CHAR(CUM.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS regstDttm , TO_CHAR(CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS lastLoginDt , DEL_YN as delYn , USG_YN as usgYn ,ATTC_SCTN_CD ,ORGN_ID ,REGST_DTTM FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE 1=1 AND CUM.USG_YN in ('Y', 'S') AND CUM.REGST_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE('20000101', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') UNION all SELECT CUM.ORGN_ID as orgnId , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = CUM.ORGN_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS orgnNm , CUM.USR_ID AS usrId , CUM.USR_NM AS usrNm , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD) AS attcSctnNm , TO_CHAR(CUM.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS regstDttm , TO_CHAR(CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD hh24:mi:ss') AS lastLoginDt , DEL_YN as delYn , USG_YN as usgYn ,ATTC_SCTN_CD ,ORGN_ID ,REGST_DTTM FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE 1=1 AND CUM.USG_YN NOT IN ('Y', 'S') AND CUM.RVISN_DTTM < TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND CUM.REGST_DTTM > TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') ) a ORDER BY a.ATTC_SCTN_CD, a.ORGN_ID, a.REGST_DTTM
